quiz.title: History Quiz
quiz.description: Journey through world history, ancient civilizations, and historical events
quiz.subject: history

question.text: In which year did World War II end?
question.explanation: World War II ended in 1945 with the surrender of Japan in September.

question.text: Who was the first President of the United States?
question.explanation: George Washington served as the first President of the United States from 1789 to 1797.

question.text: Which ancient wonder of the world was located in Egypt?
question.explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only surviving ancient wonder and is located in Egypt.

question.text: The French Revolution began in which year?
question.explanation: The French Revolution began in 1789 with the storming of the Bastille on July 14th.

question.text: Which empire was ruled by Julius Caesar?
question.explanation: Julius Caesar was a Roman general and statesman who played a critical role in the Roman Republic.
